_generatedBy: Calibrated against Numbeo, Livingcost.org and World Bank GDP PPP data (April 2026)
_methodology: Monthly cost estimates in USD for a single digital nomad. Primary source: Numbeo city-level data cross-referenced with Livingcost.org country averages. Secondary: GDP PPP ratio scaling for countries without direct Numbeo coverage. utilities = electricity + water + heating + garbage + internet (Numbeo 85m² benchmark). dining = ~12 meals/month at inexpensive-to-midrange restaurants. coworking = monthly hot desk. healthInsurance = basic private/travel insurance. null indicates data unavailable or concept inapplicable.

categories.name: Rent (Major City)
categories.description: Monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the country's main hub city or cities for digital nomads.

categories.name: Rent (Smaller City)
categories.description: Monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in smaller cities or towns outside the country's main metro areas.

categories.name: Rent (2 Bedroom)
categories.description: Monthly rent for a 2-bedroom apartment. Single national average derived from Numbeo city centre and outside-centre data. Interpolated from 1BR and 3BR where 2BR data unavailable.

categories.name: Rent (3 Bedroom)
categories.description: Monthly rent for a 3-bedroom apartment. Single national average derived from Numbeo city centre and outside-centre data.

categories.name: Groceries
categories.description: Monthly grocery spending for one person cooking at home ~70% of meals. Includes fresh produce, staples, and basics.

categories.name: Dining Out
categories.description: Approximately 12 meals per month at inexpensive to mid-range restaurants. Covers lunch or dinner at a local cafe/restaurant.

categories.name: Public Transport
categories.description: Monthly public transportation pass or estimated ride-hailing costs for daily commute within the city.

categories.name: Utilities & Internet
categories.description: Monthly utilities for a 1-bedroom apartment: electricity, water, heating/cooling, garbage collection, plus a reliable internet connection (50+ Mbps where available).

categories.name: Coworking Space
categories.description: Monthly hot desk membership at a coworking space with reliable wifi, power, and basic amenities. null if no coworking spaces are available in the country.

categories.name: Health Insurance
categories.description: Monthly cost of basic private health or travel insurance suitable for a digital nomad. Covers emergency care and outpatient visits.

derivedTotals.name: Basic Monthly Budget
derivedTotals.description: Minimum monthly budget for basic living: apartment in a smaller city, home cooking, public transit, and utilities. No dining out, coworking, or insurance.

derivedTotals.name: Comfortable Monthly Budget
derivedTotals.formula: rentMajorCity + groceries + dining + transport + utilities + coworking + healthInsurance
derivedTotals.description: Comfortable nomad lifestyle: major city apartment, groceries + dining out, transport, utilities, coworking membership, and health insurance. null if coworking is unavailable.
